about.title: About iFACE International Board
about.lead: We are a sovereign digital headquarters for accreditation, training, and institutional excellence — unifying five strategic sectors under one governance model.
about.p1: iFACE combines rigorous standards, blockchain-verifiable credentials, and multilingual operations (English & Arabic) to serve professionals, institutions, and partners worldwide.
about.p2: Our platform covers training, international accreditation, consultancy, technology services, and global partnerships — with transparent finance, audit trails, and role-based access for every stakeholder.
about.pillar_1_text: Standards aligned with international frameworks and regional regulatory context.
about.pillar_2_text: Certificates and credentials designed for public verification and long-term integrity.
about.pillar_3_text: Dashboards, SLAs, and structured workflows across sectors and partners.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Reach the iFACE team for partnerships, accreditation, or general inquiries.
contact.name: Your name
contact.subject: Subject
contact.success: Thank you. Your message has been received. We will respond as soon as possible.
contact.error: Could not send your message. Please try again later.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: iFACE Global respects your privacy. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect personal data when you use our websites and portals.
privacy.s1_text: We may collect account details (name, email, role), usage logs, and data required for accreditation, training, and verification — always in line with applicable law.
privacy.s2_text: Data is used to operate the platform, issue and verify credentials, communicate with users, and improve security and service quality.
privacy.s3_text: You may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data where applicable. Contact us using the details on the Contact page.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By accessing iFACE Global services you agree to these terms. Specific programs may have additional agreements.
terms.s1_text: You must provide accurate information, keep credentials secure, and use the platform only for lawful purposes.
terms.s2_text: Content, trademarks, and materials remain the property of iFACE or its licensors unless otherwise stated.
terms.s3_text: To the extent permitted by law, iFACE is not liable for indirect damages arising from use of the platform.

verify.title: Verify a certificate
verify.subtitle: Enter the unique verification code (UVC) printed on the certificate or provided by the candidate.
verify.label: Verification code
verify.hint: You will be redirected to the public verification result for that credential.
